hooks.command: grep -qE '"stop_hook_active"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*true' && exit 0; git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^.. (src/|tools/|docs/|tests/|assets/|mise\.toml$|package\.json$|index\.html$)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"工作樹有程式／設定／設計文件改動：收尾前依 CLAUDE.md 的 Doc sync map 檢查 CLAUDE.md、README.md、docs/*、.serena/memories/* 是否需同步（不需要就不用動）。"}}' || true
